title: Mini-notation basics
summary: The building blocks of Strudel patterns: events, rests, groups, repetition, and alternation.

title: Sounds and samples
summary: Pick sounds by name, switch drum machines with .bank(), and use soundfont instruments with note().

title: Effects and filters
summary: Shape your sound with low-pass filters, reverb, delay, distortion, and envelope controls.

title: Pattern combinators
summary: Layer patterns with $: labels, combine with stack() and cat(), and explore structural tools.

title: Notes, scales, and chords
summary: Work with pitched content: note names, scale patterns, chord voicings, and the .voicing() method.

title: Time and tempo
summary: Control speed with setcpm, transform time with .fast() and .slow(), and use .every() for periodic variation.

title: Layering and structure
summary: Build full arrangements with $: labels, use .mask() for breakdowns, and layer textures with .off() and .jux().
code:
setcpm(120/4)

// Use $: labels for separate layers — mute/solo friendly:
drum: s("bd*2, ~ sd:1, hh*8")
  .bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.8)

// .mask() creates breakdowns by silencing on some cycles:
bass: note("c2 c2 eb2 g2").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(600).decay(0.15).sustain(0)
  .mask("<1 1 1 0>")

// .jux() splits stereo: left plays original, right plays transformed:
lead: note("c4 eb4 g4 bb4").s("triangle")
  .jux(rev)
  .room(0.4).delay(0.3)

// .off() overlays a delayed, modified copy:
pad: note("<c3 eb3 g3 bb3>").s("gm_pad_warm")
  .off(1/8, x => x.add(7))
  .room(0.6).gain(0.4)

title: Chord progressions (strasbeat)
summary: Use strasbeat's progression() helper for one-line chord progressions with rhythm presets, styles, and bass layers.
code:
setcpm(110/4)

// progression() is a strasbeat extension — use SINGLE QUOTES:
$: progression('Cm7 F7 Bb^7 Eb^7')
  .room(0.3).gain(0.5)

// rhythm presets: block, strum, comp, arp-up, arp-down, alberti
$: progression('Cm7 F7 Bb^7 Eb^7', { rhythm: 'arp-up' })
  .delay(0.3).delaytime(0.375).gain(0.35)

// bass: true adds a root-note bass layer:
$: progression('Am7 Dm7 G7 Cmaj7', { rhythm: 'comp', bass: true })
  .gain(0.5)

// Style presets bundle sound + rhythm + FX:
$: progression('Dm7 G7 Cmaj7 Fmaj7', { style: 'jazz-comp' })
  .gain(0.5)

drum: s("bd*2, ~ sd:1, hh*8")
  .bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.6)

title: Add a delay effect
summary: Chain .delay(), .delaytime(), and .delayfeedback() on any pattern to add an echo effect. Time in seconds, feedback 0–1.
code:
setcpm(120/4)

$: note("c4 ~ e4 ~ g4 ~ e4 ~").s("gm_vibraphone")
  .delay(0.5)
  .delaytime(0.375)
  .delayfeedback(0.4)
  .room(0.2)

title: Add randomness and probability
summary: Use ? in mini-notation for random drops, .sometimes() for random transforms, and .rand() / .choose() for variation.

title: Add reverb
summary: Use .room() for reverb amount (0–1) and .size() for the tail length. Combine with .lpf() to tame brightness.
code:
setcpm(100/4)

$: note("c3 e3 g3 b3").s("gm_electric_piano_1")
  .room(0.7)
  .size(0.9)
  .lpf(2000)
  .gain(0.6)

title: Build a breakdown with .mask()
summary: Use .mask() with <> alternation to silence layers on specific cycles. Perfect for drop/build arrangements.
code:
setcpm(130/4)

// .mask("<1 1 1 0>") silences every 4th cycle:
drum: s("bd*2, ~ sd:1, hh*8")
  .bank("RolandTR909")
  .mask("<1 1 1 0>")

bass: note("c2 c2 eb2 g2").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(600).decay(0.15).sustain(0)
  .mask("<1 1 1 0>")

// Pad plays through the breakdown for continuity:
pad: note("<c3 eb3 g3 bb3>").s("gm_pad_warm")
  .room(0.6).gain(0.4)

title: Build a drum pattern
summary: Layer kick, snare, and hi-hats using $: labels. Use .bank() to pick a machine, * for repeats, ~ for rests.
code:
setcpm(120/4)

$: s("bd*2").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.9)
$: s("~ sd ~ sd").bank("RolandTR909")
$: s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.45)
$: s("~ ~ ~ oh").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.3)

title: Chop and slice samples
summary: Use .chop() to granulate, .splice() for rearranging, and .begin()/.end() for precise sample playback.

title: Create evolving patterns
summary: Use .every(), .slow(), and <> alternation to make patterns that change over time without manual arrangement.
code:
setcpm(120/4)

// .every() applies a transform periodically:
$: s("bd sd bd sd")
  .every(4, x => x.fast(2))
  .every(3, x => x.speed(1.5))

// <> alternation changes each cycle:
$: note("<c3 e3 g3 b3>").s("gm_vibraphone")
  .room(0.4)

// .slow() stretches across multiple cycles:
$: note("c3 d3 e3 f3 g3 a3 b3 c4")
  .s("triangle")
  .slow(4)
  .room(0.3).gain(0.5)

title: Create stereo width
summary: Use .jux() to split L/R and transform one side, or .pan() with a signal for auto-panning.
code:
setcpm(110/4)

// .jux(rev) plays original left, reversed right:
$: note("c4 e4 g4 b4").s("triangle")
  .jux(rev)
  .room(0.3)

// .pan() with sine for smooth auto-pan:
$: note("c3 e3 g3").s("gm_vibraphone")
  .pan(sine.slow(4))
  .room(0.4).gain(0.5)

title: Euclidean rhythms
summary: Use (k,n) in mini-notation for Euclidean patterns: k hits spread evenly across n steps. Great for polyrhythms.

title: Filter sweep with an LFO
summary: Use sine.range() to sweep .lpf() over time. .slow() controls sweep speed. .lpq() adds resonance.
code:
setcpm(120/4)

$: note("c2 c2 eb2 g2").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(sine.range(200, 2000).slow(8))
  .lpq(12)
  .decay(0.15).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.7)

title: Make a chord progression
summary: Use progression() with single-quoted chord symbols. Add rhythm presets, bass layers, and style presets for instant arrangements.

title: Signal modulation (LFOs)
summary: Use sine, saw, tri, square, and perlin as modulation sources. Chain .range() to set bounds and .slow()/.fast() for speed.
code:
setcpm(100/4)

$: note("c3 e3 g3 b3").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(sine.range(400, 2000).slow(4))
  .lpq(8)
  .gain(saw.range(0.3, 0.8).slow(2))
  .pan(sine.slow(8))
  .room(perlin.range(0.1, 0.6))
  .decay(0.2).sustain(0)

title: Ambient pad wash
summary: Slow-moving chord pads with reverb, delay, and gentle filter modulation.
code:
setcpm(72/4)

$: chord("<Cm9 Fm9 Bbmaj7 Ebmaj7>")
  .s("gm_pad_warm")
  .voicing()
  .room(0.8).size(0.95)
  .lpf(sine.range(800, 2000).slow(16))
  .delay(0.4).delaytime(0.5).delayfeedback(0.5)
  .gain(0.35)

$: note("~ ~ c5 ~").s("gm_vibraphone")
  .room(0.9).delay(0.6).gain(0.15)

title: Chopped breakbeat
summary: Euclidean rhythms meet chopped breaks with filter automation.
code:
setcpm(140/4)

$: s("bd(3,8)").gain(0.9)
$: s("sd(2,8,1)").gain(0.8)
$: s("hh(5,8)").gain(0.4)
$: s("oh(1,8,3)").gain(0.3)

$: note("c2 [~ c2] eb2 ~").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(800)
  .decay(0.1).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.7)

$: note("c4 eb4 g4 bb4").s("triangle")
  .every(3, rev)
  .jux(x => x.fast(2))
  .room(0.3).gain(0.3)

title: Folk strum pattern
summary: Acoustic guitar strum using the folk-strum progression style with a simple arrangement.
code:
setcpm(100/4)

$: progression('G D Em C', { style: 'folk-strum' })
  .room(0.3)
  .gain(0.5)

$: note("<g2 d2 e2 c2>").s("gm_acoustic_bass")
  .gain(0.5)

$: s("~ ~ ~ hh").gain(0.2)

title: Four-on-the-floor house
summary: Classic house beat with 909 drums, acid bass line, and atmospheric pad.
code:
setcpm(124/4)

$: s("bd*4").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.9)
$: s("~ ~ ~ oh").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.3)
$: s("~ cp ~ ~").bank("RolandTR909")
$: s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.4)

$: note("c2 ~ c2 [~ c3]").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(sine.range(300, 1200).slow(8))
  .lpq(12)
  .decay(0.12).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.7)

$: note("<c4 eb4 g4 bb4>").s("gm_pad_warm")
  .room(0.6).gain(0.25)

title: Generative ambient
summary: Perlin noise and probability create an ever-changing ambient texture that never quite repeats.
code:
setcpm(60/4)

$: note("c4 e4 g4 b4 d5 b4 g4 e4")
  .s("gm_vibraphone")
  .gain(perlin.range(0, 0.6))
  .pan(perlin.range(0.2, 0.8).slow(3))
  .room(0.8).delay(0.6).delayfeedback(0.6)
  .slow(2)

$: note("<c3 g2 a2 f2>").s("gm_pad_warm")
  .room(0.9).gain(0.25)

$: s("hh?").gain(0.15).room(0.8)
  .pan(rand)

title: Jazz standard sketch
summary: II-V-I progression with jazz-comp style, walking bass, and brushed drums.
code:
setcpm(140/4)

$: progression('Dm7 G7 Cmaj7 Cmaj7', {
  style: 'jazz-comp',
  bass: true,
}).gain(0.5)

$: s("bd ~ [~ bd] ~, ~ sd ~ ~, hh*4")
  .gain(0.5)
  .room(0.3)

title: Lo-fi hip hop
summary: Chill dusty beat with jazzy chords, vinyl crackle texture, and swung hi-hats.
code:
setcpm(85/4)

$: s("bd ~ [~ bd] ~, ~ sd ~ sd")
  .bank("RolandTR808")
  .gain(0.8)

$: s("hh*8").gain(0.3)
  .speed("1 1.02 0.98 1.01 1 0.99 1.02 1")

$: progression('Dm9 G13 Cmaj9 Am7', { rhythm: 'comp' })
  .lpf(1800)
  .room(0.4)
  .gain(0.45)

$: note("<d3 g2 c3 a2>").s("gm_acoustic_bass")
  .gain(0.55)

title: Minimal techno
summary: Stripped-back techno with evolving filter sweeps and sparse percussion.
code:
setcpm(132/4)

$: s("bd*4").gain(0.9)
$: s("~ hh ~ hh").gain(0.3)
$: s("~ ~ ~ rim").every(4, x => x.fast(2)).gain(0.5)

$: note("c2*4").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(sine.range(200, 3000).slow(16))
  .lpq(15)
  .decay(0.08).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.6)

$: note("<c4 ~ eb4 ~>").s("triangle")
  .room(0.4).delay(0.5).delaytime(0.375)
  .gain(0.2)

title: Polyrhythmic exploration
summary: Layered Euclidean patterns creating interlocking polyrhythmic grooves.
code:
setcpm(110/4)

// 3 against 4 against 5:
$: s("bd(3,8)").gain(0.9)
$: s("rim(5,8)").gain(0.5)
$: s("hh(7,16)").gain(0.35)
$: s("cp(2,8,3)").room(0.5).gain(0.4)

$: note("c3(3,8)").s("gm_acoustic_bass")
  .gain(0.6)

$: note("g4(5,8)").s("gm_vibraphone")
  .room(0.5).delay(0.3)
  .gain(0.3)

title: Synthwave arpeggios
summary: 80s-style arpeggiated synths with gated reverb drums and pulsing bass.
code:
setcpm(118/4)

$: s("bd*4").gain(0.9)
$: s("~ sd ~ sd").room(0.4).gain(0.7)
$: s("hh*8").gain(0.3)

$: progression('Am Fmaj7 C G', { rhythm: 'arp-up' })
  .delay(0.3).delaytime(0.25).delayfeedback(0.3)
  .gain(0.4)

$: note("a1*4 f1*4 c2*4 g1*4").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(400)
  .decay(0.1).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.6)
